---
title: "Projects"
---

## Projects

<div class="project-card">
  <h2>Expense Analysis Dashboard</h2>
  <p>Analyzed monthly operating costs to identify key spending trends.</p>
  <ul>
    <li><strong>Tools:</strong> Excel, Power Query, Power BI</li>
    <li><strong>Action:</strong> Built dashboards and automated reporting</li>
    <li><strong>Result:</strong> Improved visibility of expenses and supported budgeting decisions</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
  <h2>Budget vs Actual Analysis</h2>
  <p>Compared planned budgets with actual results to identify variances.</p>
  <ul>
    <li><strong>Tools:</strong> Excel</li>
    <li><strong>Action:</strong> Performed variance analysis and reporting</li>
    <li><strong>Result:</strong> Supported financial planning and decision-making</li>
  </ul>
</div>
